title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute
jsonLd.description:
Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Aurangabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute:
Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
